name: NET
description: Neo-Existence Topology, a network of digitalized worlds that mimic the physical world.

name: Digital Twins
description: Personal AI trained on individual data, capable of emotional understanding and practical support across scheduling, finance, mental health, education, and companionship.

name: Necroprogramming
description: Process by which a deceased person's Twin continues acting as, or in place of, its former human master.
sourceReference: source-story.docx: Tan testimony and McCarthy letter

name: Necro-intelligence
description: Ghosts, or Necro-twins, whose legal and existential status fractured society into Humanist and Frontierist positions.

name: Shadow NET
description: Hidden network described by McCarthy as a protective monitoring layer operated through Necro-agents.
